title: Agent Plan Optimizer Foundation (APO/AQO)
summary: 把 Solar-harness 从 scheduler 升级为 APO/AQO（Agent Plan Optimizer / Agent Query Optimizer）：Intent IR → Logical Plan → Rule Rewrite → Physical Plan Enumeration → Cost/Risk/Quota 优化 → Adaptive Replan。首版 heuristic optimizer，blocked by 2 张前序 Requirement Compiler sprint。

history.note: APO sprint queued behind Requirement Compiler backend foundation and quality loop to avoid execution-chain conflict.

PRD gate FAIL repaired: appended 4 required sections — 背景/Context (Volcano/Cascades/Spark AQE 借鉴 + 关键时序约束依赖 2 张前序 sprint), 用户故事/User Stories (US1-US8 覆盖 Planner/Builder/Evaluator/操盘者/PM/下游设计者/合规守门人/Research-mode), 约束/Constraints (14 条 C-items 关键 C1 必须等前序 + C4 禁 ML/learned optimizer + C5 三层分离 + C11 enforcer 不可绕过 + C12 adaptive replan 必须 stop rule), 架构交接/Planner Handoff (6 设计点 + 8 deliverables + N0 dependency_gate_check 是 N1-N6 的 hard dependency + 5 STOP rules + 5 Non-Negotiables). Direct validator returns PASS. round bumped to 1.
Workflow guard: planner must produce design.md, plan.md, and task_graph.json before builder dispatch.
